meta.title: Divert: Cloudy Morning (noimport)
description: Divert: Cloudy Morning (noimport) replays a cloudy morning feed with intermittent solar surplus and changing charge opportunities.
No-import settings should be more conservative, preferring to leave surplus unused rather than import from the grid.
This variant is driven from solar input, so the main comparison is available charge power versus actual EV charge power.
